unclosed.text: Chase Export (Brill) invoice #1020 — €14,302 now 15 days overdue
Follow up Bars & Pubs FI invoice #1018 — €14,651 overdue 21 days

ceo.headline: €74K overdue — export collections must close before Friday payroll
ceo.cash_position: Bank −€5,200 today; €62,781 fixed costs due by month-end
ceo.ar_summary: €215K open AR, €74K overdue across 6 invoices — Brill & B&P are the main exposure
ceo.runway: Approx 3–4 weeks at current burn if overdue AR stays unpaid; sufficient if Brill pays this week
ceo.narrative: Two export invoices (Brill €14,302 and Other Export €25,200) are 11–21 days overdue and together with Bars & Pubs FI create a €74K collection gap. Fixed payroll and loan repayment of €62,781 hit by 28 March — the bank balance needs to turn positive by Monday. If Brill confirms payment this week, cash position normalises. If not, a short-term credit line draw needs authorisation today.

actions.text: Authorise sales team to escalate Brill to director-level contact if no payment confirmation by 14:00 today
Confirm with finance: if Brill doesn't pay by Friday, draw €20K on OP credit facility for payroll buffer
Review raw material orders for April — delay non-critical POs by 1 week to protect cash

ceo.focus: Cash bridge for payroll: confirm Brill payment ETA or authorise credit line draw — decide by 14:00

sales.headline: 3 customers with overdue invoices need direct calls today — not emails
sales.narrative: Export (Brill) invoice #1020 for €14,302 is now 15 days overdue — this was flagged yesterday and no payment confirmation received. Bars & Pubs FI has two overdue invoices totalling €35,392 (21 and 11 days late). Other Export invoice #1019 at €25,200 is 11 days overdue. Combined €74K. Call, not email — get a confirmed payment date with a calendar invite.

actions.text: Call Brill contact directly — get written payment commitment for #1020 (€14,302) by end of day
Call Bars & Pubs FI: chase #1018 (€14,651, 21d) and #1007 (€20,741) — agree a payment plan if needed
Call Other Export contact for #1019 (€25,200) — confirm week of payment
Flag Kesko invoices #1000 and #1001 (€18,600 combined) — both overdue, escalate if no response by tomorrow

sales.focus: Phone calls only today — three calls before noon, get written payment confirmations before 17:00

production.headline: April raw material orders need cash approval before Friday
production.narrative: Summer brewing ramp starts in April. Raw material orders for May–June production (malt, hops, packaging) need to go out by end of April to secure capacity. Current AP outstanding is €74K — Cans & Packaging invoice #5003 is already overdue. Production schedule is safe for March but April funding depends on this week's AR collections.

actions.text: Submit April raw material order list to CEO/Finance for cash approval — needed by Friday 28 March
Confirm Cans & Packaging (#5003, €8,807 overdue) payment with finance — supplier may hold next delivery
Map inventory days for May-peak planning — share estimate with CEO for working capital forecast

production.focus: Get April material orders approved this week — any delay in ordering risks summer capacity

marketing.headline: Hold all non-committed spend this week — cash is tight
marketing.narrative: Bank balance is negative and the business has €74K in overdue AR to collect before end-March payroll. This week is not the time for new campaign spend commitments. All approved campaigns can proceed. Any new spend requests above €500 should wait until next week when collection picture is clearer.

actions.text: Pause any unconfirmed spend requests this week — resubmit from Monday 30 March if collections clear
China market launch prep: timeline is fine, but budget approval will follow Q2 cash review — flag if vendor deposits are needed ahead of collections

marketing.focus: No new spend this week — continue approved campaigns, hold everything else until Monday

weekly.headline: Collections behind plan — strong May order book ahead
highlights: Overdue AR increased to €74K — Brill and Other Export accounts are the main drivers
Bank balance moved negative (−€5,200) for the first time this quarter — manageable but needs monitoring
Bemböle contract paid on time — €25K received as expected
May–June order book looks strong across domestic channels; summer volume on track
Raw material costs for Q2 need cash approval — €80–100K estimate for April orders
decisions_needed: Authorise OP credit line draw (up to €20K) as payroll buffer if Brill and B&P don't pay by Friday
Approve April raw material purchase orders before end of week to secure summer brewing capacity
Decide on China order timing — needs to appear in the Forecast scenario to reflect full-year cash impact
